© Internet Alchemy, Inc. All rights reserved. 	2
In fact, what if I took things WAY
further...
And took you with me "backstage"
on the pro tour for a few days...
With the ENTIRE list of players
above?
Because that's what I'm about to do
:-)
Although backstage might not be
the right word...
Instead, imagine you were
immersed in the pro tour...
For one tournament...
Will Hamilton
And you stayed where the players
stay...
You ate where the players ate...
Traveled to and from the tournament
with the players...
You were in the players area at the
tournament, right there with them...
And best of all...?
You PLAYED them!
It's almost as if you magically
became a professional tennis players
for a few days, and got to experience
what that is like...
Will Hamilton
How can I make that happen? Like
this:
The Citi Open is right around the
corner, and EVERY player listed
above is playing in the
tournament...
And I've organized this immersive
experience, which is literally not
possible at any other tournament in
the world...
(I'll tell you why in just a sec)
Here's how it will go down:
On Sunday, August 2nd you'll arrive
in Washington, DC...
There will be a car waiting for you
to take you to the Marriott Marquis
in downtown Washington, DC
where YOU are staying with all the
players...
Will Hamilton
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 2 of 11 --

© Internet Alchemy, Inc. All rights reserved. 	3
(Be prepared to ride up and down in
the elevator with practically the entire
draw, and if the thought of that weirds
you out, take the stairs, lol)
At the hotel there's a players only
dinner that night...
Well, players only plus YOU...
(It's more spacious than the elevator,
lol)
After dinner, we'll head over to the
players party...
And remember the player you wanted
to have a beer with earlier?
Now's your chance!
Don't stay out too late, because on
Monday we've got something special
planned...
Will Hamilton
A private clinic with the Bryan Bros!
This is a chance to improve your
doubles game with the help of the best
doubles team of all time...
And have a ton of fun playing points
with - and against - Bob & Mike...
(SERIOUS bragging rights back home
if you're able to pass the Bros!)
After the clinic with the Bros, we've got
another one...
Now with ATP/WTA coaches...
Will Hamilton
Remember:
You're "on" the pro tour, and that
means you get coached by the players'
coaches...
Also known as the best coaches on the
PLANET...
After your training session, we can
relax, in a fully stocked suite at the
tournament...
Time to watch the players listed above
duke it out from the comfort of AC :-)
On Tuesday, and this is BIG...
You've got another clinic...
With the PLAYERS...
Will Hamilton
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 3 of 11 --

© Internet Alchemy, Inc. All rights reserved. 	4
So think back to the two players from
earlier - the player you want to hit with,
and the player you want to take a
lesson from...
Imagine that happening?
Better yet, imagine it happening with a
LAUNDRY LIST of players...
Sound cool?
Ya, of course it does :-)
After all that insanity, we're still not
done...
Because we've got box seats that
night...
Time to watch the guys and gals
compete UP CLOSE...
Will Hamilton
Oh, and one more thing...
Because this is an immersive
experience, you've got a players
credential...
Which means you can access the
players cafe and lounge, and hang out
with them, whenever you want...
For the ENTIRE tournament, if you
decide to stick around after the
experience officially ends on
Wednesday, August 5th...
Will Hamilton
Now, you might be wondering, how did
I pull this off?
Well, it's kind of a perfect storm really,
because I'm friends with, and work
closely with, the folks who run the Citi
Open...
And they've agreed to let me have full
access to the tournament, and the
players...
And when you marry those two things?
You've got yourself a once in a lifetime
"bucket list" experience where you are
immersed on the pro tour...
(An experience I'm not sure if I'm going
to do again, because this is an insane
amount of work to put together...)
So if you're interested, here's what you
should do next:
Will Hamilton
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

© Internet Alchemy, Inc. All rights reserved. 	5
Below is a link to an application.
Coming to this event is kind of like
borrowing a really expensive sports
car, and I just need to make sure you'll
bring it back without a scratch.
I know you will, but because the
tournament is allowing me to give you
such crazy access, I owe it to them to
make sure everyone coming is cool
and won't tackle their favorite player
the second they see him/her in the
players area, because let's face it:
Tommy Haas is really handsome :-)
Will Hamilton
One fair warning before you apply - it's
an expensive event. Making all this
happen isn't cheap or easy, but you
already knew that.
So with that in mind, here's the link...
Go apply now if you're interested,
because it's first come, first serve...
See ya in DC!
CLICK HERE to join the pro tour :-)
Talk soon,
Will

A LaunchCon Exclusive from Will Hamilton
And you stayed where the players stay...
You ate where the players ate...
Traveled to and from the tournament with the players...
You were in the players area at the tournament, right there with them...
And best of all...?
You PLAYED them!
It's almost as if you magically became a professional tennis players for a few days,
and got to experience what that is like...
How can I make that happen? Like this:
The Citi Open is right around the corner, and EVERY player listed above is playing in
the tournament...
And I've organized this immersive experience, which is literally not possible at any
other tournament in the world...
(I'll tell you why in just a sec)
Here's how it will go down:
On Sunday, August 2nd you'll arrive in Washington, DC...
There will be a car waiting for you to take you to the Marriott Marquis in downtown
Washington, DC where YOU are staying with all the players...
(Be prepared to ride up and down in the elevator with practically the entire draw,
and if the thought of that weirds you out, take the stairs, lol)
At the hotel there's a players only dinner that night...
Well, players only plus YOU...
(It's more spacious than the elevator, lol)
After dinner, we'll head over to the players party...
And remember the player you wanted to have a beer with earlier?
Now's your chance!
Don't stay out too late, because on Monday we've got something special
planned...
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

A LaunchCon Exclusive from Will Hamilton
A private clinic with the Bryan Bros!
This is a chance to improve your doubles game with the help of the best doubles
team of all time...
And have a ton of fun playing points with - and against - Bob & Mike...
(SERIOUS bragging rights back home if you're able to pass the Bros!)
After the clinic with the Bros, we've got another one...
Now with ATP/WTA coaches...
Remember:
You're "on" the pro tour, and that means you get coached by the players'
coaches...
Also known as the best coaches on the PLANET...
After your training session, we can relax, in a fully stocked suite at the tournament...
Time to watch the players listed above duke it out from the comfort of AC :-)
On Tuesday, and this is BIG...
You've got another clinic...
With the PLAYERS...
So think back to the two players from earlier - the player you want to hit with, and
the player you want to take a lesson from...
Imagine that happening?
Better yet, imagine it happening with a LAUNDRY LIST of players...
Sound cool?
Ya, of course it does :-)
After all that insanity, we're still not done...
Because we've got box seats that night...
Time to watch the guys and gals compete UP CLOSE...
Oh, and one more thing...
Because this is an immersive experience, you've got a players credential...
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

A LaunchCon Exclusive from Will Hamilton
Which means you can access the players cafe and lounge, and hang out with
them, whenever you want...
For the ENTIRE tournament, if you decide to stick around after the experience
officially ends on Wednesday, August 5th...
Now, you might be wondering, how did I pull this off?
Well, it's kind of a perfect storm really, because I'm friends with, and work closely
with, the folks who run the Citi Open...
And they've agreed to let me have full access to the tournament, and the
players...
And when you marry those two things?
You've got yourself a once in a lifetime "bucket list" experience where you are
immersed on the pro tour...
(An experience I'm not sure if I'm going to do again, because this is an insane
amount of work to put together...)
So if you're interested, here's what you should do next:
Below is a link to an application.
Coming to this event is kind of like borrowing a really expensive sports car, and I just
need to make sure you'll bring it back without a scratch.
I know you will, but because the tournament is allowing me to give you such crazy
access, I owe it to them to make sure everyone coming is cool and won't tackle
their favorite player the second they see him/her in the players area, because let's
face it:
Tommy Haas is really handsome :-)
One fair warning before you apply - it's an expensive event. Making all this
happen isn't cheap or easy, but you already knew that.
So with that in mind, here's the link...
Go apply now if you're interested, because it's first come, first serve...
See ya in DC!
CLICK HERE to join the pro tour :-)
Talk soon,
Will
